response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff Software Engineer with strong distributed systems and polyglot programming skills, but lacks the executive leadership, team scaling, and production multi-agent AI architecture experience required for this CTO role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience with distributed systems and high-throughput microservices.
Strong polyglot engineering background emphasizing software craftsmanship, TDD, and CI/CD.
Recent foundational exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP).
concerns: Complete lack of executive leadership experience or track record scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+.
No demonstrated experience architecting complex, production-grade multi-agent AI systems for commercial use.
Lacks deep AI-native fintech experience, such as real-time credit-risk or algorithmic working-capital management.
